chunks.text: In a democratic society, the press has been called the " fourth power.
" Alongside the legislative, the executive, and the judicial
it is one of the pillars that supports society.
Journalist carry the role of revealing wrongdoing in government and business and passing that on to the citizens.
Investigative reporting has often been the trigger that has changed society.
two young reporters drove the American president to resign through their investigation.
That was an example of how the power of the press can shake even authority itself.
In our time, however, the reliability of information has become a great challenge.
Information sent out without checking the source, deliberate disinformation.
These can twist the judgment of society.
Under dictatorships in various countries, censorship is common
and it is not rare for journalists to be imprisoned.
Press freedom is not taken for granted in every country.
we must develop the ability to judge what is a reliable source.
To protect the freedom of the press is, in the end
